metadata.description: XRPL plugin marketplace — three modular plugins for XRP Ledger: HTTP cloud client, local stdio server, and offline wallet signer. Source code, binaries and manifests live atomically in this repo.

plugins.name: xrpl-cloud
plugins.description: Lightweight HTTP MCP that proxies to the StaticBit cloud server at xrpl-mcp.staticbit.io. Read/prepare/submit XRPL transactions without running anything locally. Bearer-authed. ~10 KB.

plugins.name: xrpl-local
plugins.description: Local stdio MCP — the same XRPL toolkit (read/prepare/submit) running fully on the user's machine. Connects directly to public XRPL nodes (xrplcluster.com etc) over WebSocket. No bearer, no cloud dependency, no third-party observer.

plugins.name: xrpl-signer
plugins.description: Offline stdio MCP for XRPL wallet management and transaction signing. Encrypted keystore (PBKDF2 + AES-256-GCM), per-wallet salt/IV. Zero network code path — pure crypto. Pairs with either xrpl-cloud or xrpl-local for the prepare/submit half of the flow.
